description: Tread depth below minimum threshold at 2.8mm across all axles. Immediate replacement required to comply with safety regulations.
Irregular wear pattern detected on rear axle. Possible misalignment. Recommend vehicle alignment check before next 5000 km.
Consistent under-inflation detected (avg 5% below recommended PSI). Possible slow puncture or valve issue. Monitor at next visit.
Vehicle load appears to exceed tire load rating on long-haul routes. Monitor wear acceleration at next scheduled inspection.
Inner edge wear on front left tire suggests wheel misalignment. Recommend alignment check at next scheduled service.
